title: Board level view permissions setting
excerpt: Hi. When item level permissions are set on a board by its owners so non-owner members can only see/edit items they are assigned to in a people column - no matter what restrictions were applied, the board Views are always…

posts.author: yossir.rousso (Yossi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. When item level permissions are set on a board by its owners so non-owner members can only see/edit items they are assigned to in a people column - no matter what restrictions were applied, the board Views are always visible to all, some can be without relevant data for those restricted members.
It would have been great to be able to set similar permissions on a board View level. Meaning to have some setting on the board to allow any view to become visible or hidden based on various permissions criteria (perhaps Teams related etc.).
I’d be happy to discuss this with a monday product manager.

posts.author: dedmiston (Derrick Edmiston)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to have it where all views are seen by the Board Owners. Then if a board guest/subscriber only have certain views designated by the board owners (or template).
